title: Recursion should not be infinite
description: Checks for infinite recursion in Python functions.
impact: Infinite recursion can lead to a stack overflow and crash the program.
recommendation: Refactor the code to avoid infinite recursion.
why_is_this_an_issue: Infinite recursion can lead to a stack overflow and crash the program.
how_to_fix: Refactor the code to avoid infinite recursion.
